Uses of Class
org.openapitools.codegen.meta.FeatureSet.Builder

Packages that use FeatureSet.Builder
Package
Description
org.openapitools.codegen.meta
 

  • Uses of FeatureSet.Builder in org.openapitools.codegen.meta

    Methods in org.openapitools.codegen.meta that return FeatureSet.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.clientModificationFeatures(EnumSet<ClientModificationFeature> clientModificationFeatures)
    Sets the clientModificationFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.dataTypeFeatures(EnumSet<DataTypeFeature> dataTypeFeatures)
    Sets the dataTypeFeatures and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.documentationFeatures(EnumSet<DocumentationFeature> documentationFeatures)
    Sets the documentationFeature and returns a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature... clientModificationFeature)
    Excludes the defined ClientModificationFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature... dataTypeFeature)
    Excludes the defined DataTypeFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeDocumentationFeatures(DocumentationFeature... documentationFeature)
    Excludes the defined DocumentationFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
    Excludes the defined GlobalFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeParameterFeatures(ParameterFeature... parameterFeature)
    Excludes the defined ParameterFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeSchemaSupportFeatures(SchemaSupportFeature... schemaSupportFeature)
    Excludes the defined SchemaSupportFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeSecurityFeatures(SecurityFeature... securityFeature)
    Excludes the defined SecurityFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.excludeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature... wireFormatFeature)
    Excludes the defined WireFormatFeature from the set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.globalFeatures(EnumSet<GlobalFeature> globalFeatures)
    Sets the globalFeatures and return a reference to this Builder so that the methods can be chained together.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeClientModificationFeatures(ClientModificationFeature... clientModificationFeature)
    Includes the defined ClientModificationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeDataTypeFeatures(DataTypeFeature... dataTypeFeature)
    Includes the defined DataTypeFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeDocumentationFeatures(DocumentationFeature... documentationFeature)
    Includes the defined DocumentationFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeGlobalFeatures(GlobalFeature... globalFeature)
    Includes the defined GlobalFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeParameterFeatures(ParameterFeature... parameterFeature)
    Includes the defined ParameterFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeSchemaSupportFeatures(SchemaSupportFeature... schemaSupportFeature)
    Includes the defined SchemaSupportFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeSecurityFeatures(SecurityFeature... securityFeature)
    Includes the defined SecurityFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
    FeatureSet.Builder
    FeatureSet.Builder.includeWireFormatFeatures(WireFormatFeature... wireFormatFeature)
    Includes the defined WireFormatFeature to the new/existing set of supported features.
